title: Checking out WOW2 - The Creative Multi-Filterbox by Sugar Bytes!
description:
WOW2 is a versatile filter plug-in with a future-dripping user interface, 21 incredible filter types and the famous vowel mode.

With distortions that cover your tracks with gas and put them on fire. Modulations that cause more trouble than your modular dark room. And finally that warm and juicy sound, that you were looking for.

Get WOW2 now at 50% off for a limited time only, hurry and save!

Learn more: https://audioplugin.deals/deal-1
